minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

minting_now.name: Chilling vibe
minting_now.description:
Not your ordinary ghost. Just catching the Chilling Vibe.
Meet the purple spirits who decided to ditch the scaring and start living. Dressed in wigs and glasses, they’re here to master the art of 'Human Cosplay.' Join the chillest community on the Polygon network.

minting_now.name: Cap-Ghost#001
minting_now.description: Not your average spirit. Cap-Ghosty roams the digital void, expressing its identity through a curated collection of caps and frames. Adopt a smart specter today.
